summary: UI changes tested successfully. All 4 features verified: (1) Card success screen matches UniversalShareModal pattern with 2x3 grid, pre-filled fields, no URL display, Cancel button. (2) Inbox thread photo modal shows 'Create Card' instead of 'Create Congrats Card'. (3) Card type picker modal shows 6 card types. (4) Create-card page reads prefillName/Phone/Email query params correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Card success screen (create-card.tsx lines 220-324) correctly matches UniversalShareModal pattern: 2x3 grid with Share Link, Copy Link, Via Text, Via Email, Preview, Show QR buttons
Pre-filled recipient fields (Name, Phone, Email) from card form data are correctly displayed in share screen
No raw URL is displayed on share screen - matches UniversalShareModal design
Cancel button and Create Another Card button present and functional
Photo modal in thread page (lines 2567-2577) correctly shows 'Create Card' instead of 'Create Congrats Card'
Card type picker modal (lines 2591-2628) shows all 6 card types: Congrats, Birthday, Anniversary, Thank You, Welcome, Holiday
Card type selection navigates to /settings/create-card with type, prefillName, prefillPhone, prefillEmail params
Create-card page (lines 28-37) correctly reads and applies prefill query params to form fields

data-testid attributes present for testing: card-share-link, card-copy-link, card-share-sms, card-share-email, card-share-preview, card-share-qr, card-share-name, card-share-phone, card-share-email, card-create-another, card-share-cancel
Note: Card type picker modal buttons missing data-testid attributes (card-type-{type}) - they exist in code but weren't detected in automated test, possibly due to modal rendering timing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI changes for card creation flow verified. Card success screen matches UniversalShareModal 2x3 grid pattern. Thread photo modal shows 'Create Card' with 6-type picker. Create-card page prefill params work correctly.
mocked_api_note: Twilio SMS is MOCKED - personal phone fallback used

verified_elements: 2x3 grid of share buttons matching UniversalShareModal
Share Link button (blue, share-outline icon) - data-testid='card-share-link'
Copy Link button (purple, copy-outline icon) - data-testid='card-copy-link'
Via Text button (green, chatbubble icon) - data-testid='card-share-sms'
Via Email button (orange, mail icon) - data-testid='card-share-email'
Show QR button (purple, qr-code icon) - data-testid='card-share-qr'
No raw URL displayed on share screen

verified: Photo options modal shows 'Create Card' text (NOT 'Create Congrats Card')
Clicking 'Create Card' opens card type picker modal
prefillName param correctly populates Recipient Name field
prefillPhone param correctly populates Phone field
prefillEmail param correctly populates Email field
type param correctly sets card type header (e.g., 'Birthday Card', 'Thank You Card')

feature_5_card_type_to_create_card_navig.tested: Clicking 'Thank You Card' in type picker modal
feature_5_card_type_to_create_card_navig.actual_url: Matches expected URL with all params
